briefdescription.para: This function enables interrupts associated with the specified interrupt type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the interrupt type/mask to enable.

briefdescription.para: This function disabled interrupts associated with the specified interrupt type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the interrupt type/mask to disable.

briefdescription.para: This function installs a callback function for the specified handler type.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVPhy instance.
is the interrupt handler type which specifies which interrupt event to attach the callback for.
is the address to the callback function.
is the user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the XVphy driver.

detaileddescription.para: It will detect what kind of interrupt has happened, and will invoke the appropriate callback function.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.

briefdescription.para: This function configures the error IRQ register based on the condition to generate an ERR_IRQ event.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XVphy instance.
is the IRQ type as defined in XVphy_ErrType.
is the flag to set or clear the ErrIrq param.

briefdescription.para: This file contains functions related to XVphy interrupt handling.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 als 10/19/15 Initial release. 1.4 gm 29/11/16 Added XVphy_CfgErrIntr for ERR_IRQ impl 1.6 gm 06/08/17 Added TX and RX MMCM locked handlers
